title: XecGuard
description: the next-generation AI Guardrail safety module, instantly equips existing AI applications with robust malicious context defense. By blocking threats such as Prompt Injection, Prompt Extraction and Jailbreak attacks, XecGuard precisely enhances instruction adherence and provides active defense for enterprise AI.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
